$comment: Forces every URL through Pages Functions so the _middleware HTMLRewriter actually runs on /username and /<locale>/ paths. Without this, the SPA-fallback _redirects rule (`/* /index.html 200`) short-circuits before middleware can intercept, and the og:image meta tag never gets rewritten to /api/og/<username>. Static asset paths are excluded so chunk fetches don't pay the function-routing overhead on every request.
